1.description: retrieve Drammen municipality geometry for spatial filtering

2.description: retrieve 200-year flood zones within Drammen municipality extent

3.description: retrieve buildings in Drammen municipality that intersect 200-year flood zones

4.description: retrieve quick-clay hazard zones within Drammen municipality extent

5.description: calculate distance from each building to the nearest quick-clay hazard zone

6.description: aggregate to one row per building with minimum distance to quick-clay hazard zone

7.description: sort buildings by distance to quick-clay hazard zone ascending
